'''√k-l-dh''' ('''kaladha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cupcake|cupcake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cupcake|cupcake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √k-l-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kaladha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || kaladhithi || kaladhiji || kaladhishi || kaladhi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || kaladhuthuth || kaladhujuj || kaladhushush || kaladh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || kaladhuthu || kaladhuju || kaladhushu || kaladhu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || kaladhufuth || kaladhufuj || kaladhufush || kaladhuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || kaladhethe || kaladheje || kaladheshe || kaladhe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || kaladhothoth || kaladhojoj || kaladhoshosh || kaladh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || kaladhotho || kaladhojo || kaladhosho || kaladho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || kaladhofoth || kaladhofoj || kaladhofosh || kaladhof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kaladhïf || kaladhïf || kaladhïf || kaladhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kaladhïfïf || kaladhïfïf || kaladhïfïf || kaladhïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kaladhïf || kaladhïf || kaladhïf || kaladhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kaladhïf || kaladhïf || kaladhïf || kaladhïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || kaladhæthæ || kaladhæjæ || kaladhæshæ || kaladhæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || kaladhathath || kaladhajaj || kaladhashash || kaladh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || kaladhatha || kaladhaja || kaladhasha || kaladha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || kaladhafath || kaladhafaj || kaladhafash || kaladhaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || kaladhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gokaladhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokikaladhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || kaladhnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gokaladhnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokikaladhnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || kaladhshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokaladhnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokikaladhshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || kaladhroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gokaladhnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokikaladhroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || kaladhmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gokaladhnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokikaladhmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || kaladhsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gokaladhnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokikaladhsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || kaladhngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gokaladhnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokikaladhngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || kaladhyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gokaladhnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokikaladhyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || kaladhyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gokaladhnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokikaladhyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || kaladhnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokaladhnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokikaladhnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || kaladhnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokaladhnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokikaladhnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || kaladhnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokaladhnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokikaladhnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || kaladhshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokaladhnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokikaladhshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || kaladhshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokaladhnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokikaladhshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || kaladhshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokaladhnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokikaladhshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || kaladhronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokaladhnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokikaladhronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || kaladhroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokaladhnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokikaladhroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || kaladhromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokaladhnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokikaladhromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || kaladhmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokaladhnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokikaladhmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || kaladhmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokaladhnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokikaladhmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || kaladhmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokaladhnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokikaladhmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || kaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || kælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hokaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hokælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohokaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohokælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nükaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nükælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünükaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünükælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïkaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïkælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïkaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïkælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lukaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lukælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulukaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lulukælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || likaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || likælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilikaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilikælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kokaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kokælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokokaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokokælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kekaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kekælædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekekaladh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekekælædh
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
